sections.paragraph:
(“answers to prayers,” the servile letter ת being retained, see Lehrg. p. 528), [Anathoth], pr.n.-

(1) of a Levitical town in the tribe of Benjamin, where Jeremiah the prophet was born, Jos 21:18 Isa 10:30 Jer 1:1 [now called Anâta, عناتا. Rob. ii. 109]; Gent. n. עַנְתֹתִי 2Sa 23:27.-(2) m.-(a) 1Ch 7:8.-(b) Neh 10:20.
